channel.title: authorhouse on Flash deals to get monitored

item.title: AuthorHouse - Powerful PlayStation 2 Repair Guide: A Guide Through the PlayStation 2 Repair Process
item.description: You’ve got AuthorHouse - Powerful PlayStation 2 Repair Guide: A Guide Through the PlayStation 2 Repair Process at the following link: ℹ️: Most Playstation 2 problems are easy to fix if you know how, and that is exactly what the Powerful Playstation 2 Repair Guide will do for you It ensures you get the best usage for a longer period The Playstation 2 has a series of very common problems that are faced by thousands all over the world.
